{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphics Designer",
  "description": "The SRS Collection stands as a beacon of premier luxury, health, and wellness hospitality, celebrated for crafting bespoke wellness and lifestyle retreats tailored to discerning business and leisure travelers alike. Withillustrious properties nestled in central Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Graphics Designer to produce visually engaging designs that align with our brand identity.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating high-quality graphics for digital and print platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Design creative assets for social media, marketing campaigns, and internal communications
	Develop brand-aligned visuals, including flyers, brochures, banners, and presentations
	Collaborate with marketing and other teams to deliver compelling design solutions
	Edit images, videos, and other multimedia content as needed
	Ensure consistency in design across all platforms
	Stay updated with design trends and tools


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Graphics Designer or similar role
	Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Canva
	Strong creativity and attention to detail
	Good communication and time management skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: srsrecruitment2025@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-13",

  },

Graphics Designer Job at SRS Collection




        
    

        
        The SRS Collection stands as a beacon of premier luxury, health, and wellness hospitality, celebrated for crafting bespoke wellness and lifestyle retreats tailored to discerning business and leisure travelers alike. Withillustrious properties nestled in central Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Graphics Designer to produce visually engaging designs that align with our brand identity.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating high-quality graphics for digital and print platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Design creative assets for social media, marketing campaigns, and internal communications
	Develop brand-aligned visuals, including flyers, brochures, banners, and presentations
	Collaborate with marketing and other teams to deliver compelling design solutions
	Edit images, videos, and other multimedia content as needed
	Ensure consistency in design across all platforms
	Stay updated with design trends and tools


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Graphics Designer or similar role
	Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Canva
	Strong creativity and attention to detail
	Good communication and time management skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager - Engineering and Projects",
  "description": "Olam Agri is a market-leading, differentiated food, feed, and fiber agri-business with a global origination footprint, processing capabilities, and deep understanding of market needs built over 33 years. With a strong presence in high-growth emerging markets and products across grains &amp; oilseeds, animal feed &amp; protein, rice, edible oils, specialty grains &amp; seeds, cotton, wood products, rubber and commodity financial services.

Olam Agri is at the heart of global food and agri-trade flows with more than 40 million MT in volume traded annually. Focused on transforming food, feed and fiber for a more sustainable future, it aims at creating value for customers, enabling farming communities to prosper sustainably, and strive for a food-secure future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager - Engineering and Projects&nbsp;

Job Location: Nigeria

Job Description


	Must have led the engineering function for a multi?site operation (minimum 3 plants) or a large single-site complex.
	Develop and apply comprehensive maintenance best practices for a large wheat milling operation exceeding 1500 MTD across multiple facilities; having expertise in pasta assets is an additional benefit.
	Demonstrated capability in project management, including execution of Brown field &amp; Green field projects.
	Ensure smooth and efficient utilities operations across all plants.
	Oversee R&amp;M budget preparation and control.
	Drive cost efficiency improvement initiatives, including:
	
		OEE enhancement
		Power/steam utility cost reduction
		Maintenance optimisation programs
	
	
	Extensive and demonstrated expertise in spare management within Wheat Milling Engineering.
	Extensive hands-on exposure to Buhler, Ugur &amp; Alapala mills.
	Deep understanding of end?to?end flour milling operations, including process optimisation.
	Strong expertise in reliability engineering.
	Experience in capex planning, budgeting, and driving cost control initiatives.
	Proven ability to lead engineering teams, drive performance, and ensure operational excellence.


Key Deliverables


	Lead large Maintenance team
	
		14+ direct employees
		90+ indirect personnel
		Manage Spares Inventory &amp; control for an efficient operation.
	
	
	Design and implement an efficient manning structure for the Engineering function across sites.
	Manage Business continuity &amp; EBITIDA capex &lt; 1.5% of Gross Book Value (GBV).


Level / Reporting Team:


	Reports directly to VP-Engineering &amp; MATS head.
	Core Functions as the GM - Engineering Manager for the TCA plant.
	Receives direct reports from Engineering leads &amp; team at plants.


Key Performance Highlights:


	Effective Maintenance strategy for the Plants and operations within the BU
	Capex and Opex budgeting and implementation adherence
	Lead design, planning and implementation of expansion projects within timeframe, and cost


Strength and Leadership competency:


	Coordinates multiple teams to deliver key business priorities.
	Manages internal and external stakeholders effectively.
	Brings strong technical expertise in wheat milling and pasta operations


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Mechanical Engineering, QEHS, HACCP related certification.
	15+ years of experience in handling maintenance, utilities and projects in several jobs as mechanical/electrical engineer and project-related management.
	Relevant certifications for current practices in plant management/maintenance&nbsp;
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Ability to work with a diverse workforce.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-06",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-07",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Olam Agri"
    
  },

General Manager - Engineering and Projects Job at Olam Agri




        
    

        
        Olam Agri is a market-leading, differentiated food, feed, and fiber agri-business with a global origination footprint, processing capabilities, and deep understanding of market needs built over 33 years. With a strong presence in high-growth emerging markets and products across grains & oilseeds, animal feed & protein, rice, edible oils, specialty grains & seeds, cotton, wood products, rubber and commodity financial services.

Olam Agri is at the heart of global food and agri-trade flows with more than 40 million MT in volume traded annually. Focused on transforming food, feed and fiber for a more sustainable future, it aims at creating value for customers, enabling farming communities to prosper sustainably, and strive for a food-secure future.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager - Engineering and Projects 

Job Location: Nigeria

Job Description


	Must have led the engineering function for a multi?site operation (minimum 3 plants) or a large single-site complex.
	Develop and apply comprehensive maintenance best practices for a large wheat milling operation exceeding 1500 MTD across multiple facilities; having expertise in pasta assets is an additional benefit.
	Demonstrated capability in project management, including execution of Brown field & Green field projects.
	Ensure smooth and efficient utilities operations across all plants.
	Oversee R&M budget preparation and control.
	Drive cost efficiency improvement initiatives, including:
	
		OEE enhancement
		Power/steam utility cost reduction
		Maintenance optimisation programs
	
	
	Extensive and demonstrated expertise in spare management within Wheat Milling Engineering.
	Extensive hands-on exposure to Buhler, Ugur & Alapala mills.
	Deep understanding of end?to?end flour milling operations, including process optimisation.
	Strong expertise in reliability engineering.
	Experience in capex planning, budgeting, and driving cost control initiatives.
	Proven ability to lead engineering teams, drive performance, and ensure operational excellence.


Key Deliverables


	Lead large Maintenance team
	
		14+ direct employees
		90+ indirect personnel
		Manage Spares Inventory & control for an efficient operation.
	
	
	Design and implement an efficient manning structure for the Engineering function across sites.
	Manage Business continuity & EBITIDA capex < 1.5% of Gross Book Value (GBV).


Level / Reporting Team:


	Reports directly to VP-Engineering & MATS head.
	Core Functions as the GM - Engineering Manager for the TCA plant.
	Receives direct reports from Engineering leads & team at plants.


Key Performance Highlights:


	Effective Maintenance strategy for the Plants and operations within the BU
	Capex and Opex budgeting and implementation adherence
	Lead design, planning and implementation of expansion projects within timeframe, and cost


Strength and Leadership competency:


	Coordinates multiple teams to deliver key business priorities.
	Manages internal and external stakeholders effectively.
	Brings strong technical expertise in wheat milling and pasta operations


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering, QEHS, HACCP related certification.
	15+ years of experience in handling maintenance, utilities and projects in several jobs as mechanical/electrical engineer and project-related management.
	Relevant certifications for current practices in plant management/maintenance 
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Ability to work with a diverse workforce.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Field Sales Agent

Job Location: Mushin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	If you have passion for marketing/sales or previous experience in sales then this is for you.


What you&rsquo;ll do


	Sign up beverage vendors onto the company&#39;s platform.
	Build and maintain relationships with vendors in your area.
	Identify new opportunities and generate leads consistently.
	Support onboarded vendors and ensure they&rsquo;re actively using the platform.
	Hit your targets and grow your earnings.


What we&rsquo;re looking for


	Minimum of an ND in Marketing or related fields
	1- 2 years of experience in sales/marketing
	Someone who already knows the beverage trade in their area or is willing to learn
	Existing relationships with shop owners, vendors, or traders is a strong advantage.
	Self-driven, target-focused, and comfortable working independently
	Strong communication and people skills.


Remuneration


	Base Pay: N80,000 - N100,000/month
	Can also be reviewed based on level of experience.
	Commission: Additional earnings on every vendor you sign up and retain &mdash; the more you close, the more you earn
	Structure is performance-driven.
	Strong agents can earn well above the base pay.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: ftbtalents@gmail.com using the Job Position and location as the subject of the email.",

Field Sales Agent Job at FTB Talents




        
    

        
        FTB Talents - Our client in the Beverage/FMCG sector is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Sales Agent

Job Location: Mushin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	If you have passion for marketing/sales or previous experience in sales then this is for you.


What you’ll do
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Sign up beverage vendors onto the company's platform.
	Build and maintain relationships with vendors in your area.
	Identify new opportunities and generate leads consistently.
	Support onboarded vendors and ensure they’re actively using the platform.
	Hit your targets and grow your earnings.


What we’re looking for


	Minimum of an ND in Marketing or related fields
	1- 2 years of experience in sales/marketing
	Someone who already knows the beverage trade in their area or is willing to learn
	Existing relationships with shop owners, vendors, or traders is a strong advantage.
	Self-driven, target-focused, and comfortable working independently
	Strong communication and people skills.


Remuneration


	Base Pay: N80,000 - N100,000/month
	Can also be reviewed based on level of experience.
	Commission: Additional earnings on every vendor you sign up and retain — the more you close, the more you earn
	Structure is performance-driven.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Brand, Design & Corporate Comms Officer",
  "description": "Matrix Energy Group is a rapidly growing indigenous and integrated Oil Marketing and Trading Company in Nigeria, which was incorporated on November 25, 2004. Over the years, Matrix Energy has grown from a modest supply and distributions operation to a fully integrated petroleum products marketing and trading company with clients and suppliers all over the world. The company is owned and managed by an amalgamation of young professional Nigerians with expertise cutting across the various sectors of the energy sub-sector. In addition to this and with a strong brand distinguished by quality and service, the company has been able to draw on its many strengths with a view of creating added service value. We leverage on our trading philosophy, which is more customer-driven thereby bringing passion to our businesses and at the same time, making every client unique and every supplier a partner in our progress and achievement.

We are recruiting to fill position below:

Job Position: Brand, Design &amp; Corporate Comms Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full time

Job Purpose


	The Brand Design &amp; Corporate Communications Officer supports the development and execution of internal and external communication initiatives through visual design, content creation, branding, and employee engagement activities.
	The role is responsible for strengthening Matrix&#39;s employee and corporate brand, enhancing stakeholder engagement, improving brand visibility, and ensuring consistent messaging across all communication platforms and business units in alignment with organizational values and strategic objectives


Responsibilities &amp; Accountabilities
Corporate Branding &amp; Visual Communication:


	Develop and design visual communication materials aligned with Matrix brand standards and business objectives.
	Produce graphics, brochures, flyers, banners, presentations, infographics, posters, digital advertisements, and communication materials.
	Ensure consistency of branding across all internal and external communication channels.
	Support the implementation and governance of corporate brand guidelines.


Internal Communications &amp; Employee Engagement:


	Create and manage internal newsletters and communication bulletins.
	Design and develop communication materials for internal announcements, employee engagement campaigns, recognition initiatives, town halls, and organizational events.
	Support communication initiatives relating to culture, employee value proposition (EVP), leadership messaging, and organizational initiatives.
	Design onboarding materials, employee handbooks, event branding, and engagement campaigns.&nbsp;


External Communications &amp; Digital Content:


	Develop engaging content and visual assets for corporate social media platforms, websites, and external communication channels.
	Create graphics and multimedia content supporting recruitment campaigns, CSR initiatives, sustainability programs, and corporate events.
	Support content development for media releases, executive communication materials, and external stakeholder engagement activities.
	Coordinate website updates and digital communication activities with relevant vendors and service providers.


Social Media &amp; Digital Engagement Support:


	Support management of corporate social media accounts.
	Schedule and publish approved communication content.
	Monitor social media trends and identify opportunities to improve engagement and visibility.
	Track communication performance and provide periodic analytics and engagement reports.


Stakeholder Coordination:


	Liaise with business units and project teams to gather information, photographs, project updates, and content requirements.
	Support executive presentations and communication requests where required.
	Coordinate with vendors and external agencies on communication-related activities.


Executive Communication Support:


	Support development and design of executive presentations, leadership communication materials, speeches, announcements, and strategic communication content.
	Support communication requirements for Board, management, and corporate events where required.


Corporate Events &amp; Brand Visibility:


	Support planning and branding of corporate events, employee engagement activities, recruitment campaigns, CSR initiatives, and external stakeholder events.
	Coordinate branding materials, event communication assets, and visibility requirements.
	Coordinate and support photography, videography, and content capture for organizational activities, projects, and events.


Administrative Support:


	Provide operational and administrative support to Corporate Services as required.
	Maintain communication assets, templates, and content repositories.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Communications, Mass Communication, Graphic Design, Marketing, Media Studies, Public Relations, or any related discipline.
	1&ndash;2 years of relevant experience in Corporate Communications, Branding, Digital Media, Content Development, or Graphic Design.
	Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, After Effects).
	Working knowledge of Canva, Figma, and content management platforms.
	Strong copywriting and content editing capability
	Basic understanding of corporate communication principles and employer branding strategies
	Knowledge of digital analytics and reporting tools is an advantage
	Experience in social media management tools and website content updates.
	Strong visual storytelling and content development skills.
	Basic photography and video editing capability will be an added advantage.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Attention to detail, creativity and innovation.
	Ability to manage multiple priorities
	Strong stakeholder management skills.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-06",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-07",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Matrix Energy Group"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "200048"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Brand, Design & Corporate Comms Officer Job at Matrix Energy Group




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Matrix Energy Group is a rapidly growing indigenous and integrated Oil Marketing and Trading Company in Nigeria, which was incorporated on November 25, 2004. Over the years, Matrix Energy has grown from a modest supply and distributions operation to a fully integrated petroleum products marketing and trading company with clients and suppliers all over the world. The company is owned and managed by an amalgamation of young professional Nigerians with expertise cutting across the various sectors of the energy sub-sector. In addition to this and with a strong brand distinguished by quality and service, the company has been able to draw on its many strengths with a view of creating added service value. We leverage on our trading philosophy, which is more customer-driven thereby bringing passion to our businesses and at the same time, making every client unique and every supplier a partner in our progress and achievement.

We are recruiting to fill position below:

Job Position: Brand, Design & Corporate Comms Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full time

Job Purpose


	The Brand Design & Corporate Communications Officer supports the development and execution of internal and external communication initiatives through visual design, content creation, branding, and employee engagement activities.
	The role is responsible for strengthening Matrix's employee and corporate brand, enhancing stakeholder engagement, improving brand visibility, and ensuring consistent messaging across all communication platforms and business units in alignment with organizational values and strategic objectives


Responsibilities & Accountabilities
Corporate Branding & Visual Communication:


	Develop and design visual communication materials aligned with Matrix brand standards and business objectives.
	Produce graphics, brochures, flyers, banners, presentations, infographics, posters, digital advertisements, and communication materials.
	Ensure consistency of branding across all internal and external communication channels.
	Support the implementation and governance of corporate brand guidelines.


Internal Communications & Employee Engagement:


	Create and manage internal newsletters and communication bulletins.
	Design and develop communication materials for internal announcements, employee engagement campaigns, recognition initiatives, town halls, and organizational events.
	Support communication initiatives relating to culture, employee value proposition (EVP), leadership messaging, and organizational initiatives.
	Design onboarding materials, employee handbooks, event branding, and engagement campaigns. 


External Communications & Digital Content:


	Develop engaging content and visual assets for corporate social media platforms, websites, and external communication channels.
	Create graphics and multimedia content supporting recruitment campaigns, CSR initiatives, sustainability programs, and corporate events.
	Support content development for media releases, executive communication materials, and external stakeholder engagement activities.
	Coordinate website updates and digital communication activities with relevant vendors and service providers.


Social Media & Digital Engagement Support:


	Support management of corporate social media accounts.
	Schedule and publish approved communication content.
	Monitor social media trends and identify opportunities to improve engagement and visibility.
	Track communication performance and provide periodic analytics and engagement reports.


Stakeholder Coordination:


	Liaise with business units and project teams to gather information, photographs, project updates, and content requirements.
	Support executive presentations and communication requests where required.
	Coordinate with vendors and external agencies on communication-related activities.


Executive Communication Support:


	Support development and design of executive presentations, leadership communication materials, speeches, announcements, and strategic communication content.
	Support communication requirements for Board, management, and corporate events where required.


Corporate Events & Brand Visibility:


	Support planning and branding of corporate events, employee engagement activities, recruitment campaigns, CSR initiatives, and external stakeholder events.
	Coordinate branding materials, event communication assets, and visibility requirements.
	Coordinate and support photography, videography, and content capture for organizational activities, projects, and events.


Administrative Support:


	Provide operational and administrative support to Corporate Services as required.
	Maintain communication assets, templates, and content repositories.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Communications, Mass Communication, Graphic Design, Marketing, Media Studies, Public Relations, or any related discipline.
	1–2 years of relevant experience in Corporate Communications, Branding, Digital Media, Content Development, or Graphic Design.
	Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, After Effects).
	Working knowledge of Canva, Figma, and content management platforms.
	Strong copywriting and content editing capability
	Basic understanding of corporate communication principles and employer branding strategies
	Knowledge of digital analytics and reporting tools is an advantage
	Experience in social media management tools and website content updates.
	Strong visual storytelling and content development skills.
	Basic photography and video editing capability will be an added advantage.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Attention to detail, creativity and innovation.
	Ability to manage multiple priorities
	Strong stakeholder management    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Mecer Consulting Limited provides business and management, consulting, general training, etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	The Accountant will manage financial records, prepare reports, monitor income and expenditure, support audits, and ensure accurate documentation of all transactions.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare financial reports for management and maintain accurate accounting records.
	Record financial transactions and maintain savings, loan and repayment records.
	Perform bank reconciliations and ensure proper filing of financial documents.
	Support internal controls, audit activities and compliance checks.
	Monitor outstanding loan balances, defaults, income and expenditure.
	Support budgeting, financial planning and statutory/cooperative reporting requirements.


Key Performance Indicators


	Accuracy and timeliness of financial reports.
	Quality of reconciliations and record-keeping.
	Effectiveness of financial controls.
	Audit readiness and compliance.
	Reduction in accounting errors and unreconciled transactions.


Qualifications and Experience


	Degree or HND qualification in Accounting, Banking &amp; Finance, Economics, Business Administration or a related field.
	5-7 years of accounting experience, preferably in a cooperative, microfinance, financial institution or similar environment.
	ICAN, ANAN, ACCA or related professional certification is an added advantage.


Required Skills:


	Strong accounting and financial reporting skills.
	Knowledge of internal controls and audit procedures.
	Ability to prepare and interpret financial reports.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	Strong analytical, organisational and problem-solving skills.
	High accuracy, integrity and confidentiality.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Accountant Job at Mecer Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Mecer Consulting Limited provides business and management, consulting, general training, etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	The Accountant will manage financial records, prepare reports, monitor income and expenditure, support audits, and ensure accurate documentation of all transactions.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Prepare financial reports for management and maintain accurate accounting records.
	Record financial transactions and maintain savings, loan and repayment records.
	Perform bank reconciliations and ensure proper filing of financial documents.
	Support internal controls, audit activities and compliance checks.
	Monitor outstanding loan balances, defaults, income and expenditure.
	Support budgeting, financial planning and statutory/cooperative reporting requirements.


Key Performance Indicators


	Accuracy and timeliness of financial reports.
	Quality of reconciliations and record-keeping.
	Effectiveness of financial controls.
	Audit readiness and compliance.
	Reduction in accounting errors and unreconciled transactions.


Qualifications and Experience


	Degree or HND qualification in Accounting, Banking & Finance, Economics, Business Administration or a related field.
	5-7 years of accounting experience, preferably in a cooperative, microfinance, financial institution or similar environment.
	ICAN, ANAN, ACCA or related professional certification is an added advantage.


Required Skills:


	Strong accounting and financial reporting skills.
	Knowledge of internal controls and audit procedures.
	Ability to prepare and interpret financial reports.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	Strong analytical, organisational and problem-solving skills.
	High accuracy, integrity and confidentiality.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Accountant" as the subject of the email.
